---
title: "Research"
description: "Publications, conference contributions, and professional involvement"
toc: true
---

## Journal publications

::: {.pub-entry}
[2024]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Probing liver injuries induced by thioacetamide in human *in vitro* pooled hepatocyte experiments]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Printz RL, Pannala VR, AbdulHameed MDM, Wallqvist A. *Int. J. Mol. Sci.* 2024, 25, 3265]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2024]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Modeling Ligand Binding Site Water Networks with SILCS: Impact on Ligand Binding Orientations and Relative Binding Affinities]{.pub-title}  
[Kumar A, **Goel H**, Yu W, Zhao M, MacKerell Jr. AD. *J. Chem. Theory Comput.* 2024, 20, 11032–11048]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2023]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Assessing kidney injury induced by mercuric chloride in guinea pigs with *in vivo* and *in vitro* experiments]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Printz RL, Shiota C, Estes SK, Pannala VR, AbdulHameed MDM, Shiota M, Wallqvist A. *Int. J. Mol. Sci.* 2023, 24, 7434]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2022]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Application of SILCS in Computer-Aided Drug Design]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Hazel A, Yu W, Jo S, MacKerell Jr. AD. *New J. Chem.* 2022, 46, 919–932]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2022]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[hERG Blockade prediction by combining SILCS and Physicochemical Properties]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Yu W, MacKerell Jr. AD. *Chemistry* 2022, 4, 630–646]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2021]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Rapid and Accurate Estimation of Protein–Ligand Relative Binding Affinities using SILCS]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Hazel A, Ustach V, Jo S, Yu W, MacKerell Jr. AD. *Chem. Sci.* 2021, 12, 8844–8858]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2020]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Impact of Electronic Polarizability on Protein Functional Group Interactions]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Yu W, Ustach V, Aytenfisu AH, Sun D, MacKerell Jr. AD. *Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys.* 2020, 22, 6848]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2019]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Absorption of CO₂ in Triethyl(butyl)phosphonium 2-Cyanopyrrolide Ionic Liquid via First Principles Simulations]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Windom Z, Jackson A, Rai N. *J. Mol. Liq.* 2019, 292, 111323]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2018]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Predicting Vapor Liquid Equilibria using Density Functional Theory: A Case Study of Argon]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Ling S, Ellis BN, Taconi A, Slater B, Rai N. *J. Chem. Phys.* 2018, 148, 224501]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2018]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Transferable Potentials for Chloroethenes: Insights into Nonideal Solution Behavior of Environmental Contaminants]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Rai N. *ACS Omega* 2018, 3, 3646–3654]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2018]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Solubility of CO₂ in Triglycerides using Monte Carlo Simulations]{.pub-title}  
[Howlader MS, Venkatesan S, **Goel H**, French WT, Rai N. *Fluid Phase Equilib.* 2018, 476, 39–47]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2018]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Performance of Density Functionals for Modeling Vapor Liquid Equilibria of CO₂ and SO₂]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Jackson A, Windom Z, Rai N. *J. Comp. Chem.* 2018]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2017]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Phase Equilibria and Condensed Phase Properties for Fluorinated Alkanes via First Principles Simulations]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Butler C, Windom Z, Rai N. *Chemistry Select* 2017, 2, 11969–11976]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2016]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Vapor Liquid Equilibria of Hydrofluorocarbons Using Dispersion-Corrected and Nonlocal Density Functionals]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Butler C, Windom Z, Rai N. *J. Chem. Theory Comput.* 2016, 12, 3295–3304]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2014]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Estimation of Interfacial Tension for Immiscible and Partially Miscible Liquid Systems by Dissipative Particle Dynamics]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Chandran R, Mitra K, Majumdar S, Ray P. *Chem. Phys. Lett.* 2014, 600, 62–67]{.pub-journal}
:::

---

## Conference contributions

### Talks
- **AIChE 2014**, Atlanta — *Force Field Development of Chloroethenes*
- **AIChE 2014**, Atlanta — *VLE for Hydrofluorocarbons via First Principle Monte Carlo*
- **AIChE 2015**, Salt Lake City — *VLE of Hydrofluoromethanes via First Principles Monte Carlo*
- **AIChE 2016**, San Francisco — *Bulk Phase and Structural Properties for CO₂ and SO₂ via First Principles*
- **APS Meeting 2018**, New Orleans — *Accuracy of DFT to Predict Vapor Liquid Equilibria*

### Posters
- **BPS 2019** — *Comparison of Functional Group Affinity Patterns from Additive vs Drude Polarizable Force Fields (SILCS)*
- **BPS 2021** — *Capturing Water-mediated Interactions During Protein–Ligand Binding with SILCS*
- **SOT 2023** — *Assessing kidney injury induced by mercuric chloride in guinea pigs*
- **SOT 2024** — *Probing liver injuries induced by thioacetamide in human in vitro hepatocytes*
- **Poster Chair**, Computational Toxicology I, SOT 2024

---

## Professional involvement

**Memberships:** American Institute of Chemical Engineers (AIChE) · Biophysical Society (BPS) · Society of Toxicology (SOT)

**Peer reviewer** for: *ACS Med. Chem. Lett.*, *J. Chem. Inf. Model.*, *J. Phys. Chem. Lett.*, *Chem. Sci.*, *J. Chem. Eng. Data*, *RSC Med. Chem.*, *New J. Chem.*, *Mach. Learn.: Sci. Technol.*, *Front. Genet.*, *Molecules*, *Int. J. Mol. Sci.*, *New J. Phys.*, *BBA–General Subjects*, and more.
